code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction/anger with safety hazards or total failure
    - Product returned/defective despite proper usage attempts
    - Multiple unresolved issues combined with warnings to avoid purchase
    - Final negative conclusion overrides past positive experiences

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional but with major compromises affecting regular use
    - Short lifespan despite proper care (fails within weeks/months)
    - Partial functionality (some components work while others fail immediately)
    - "Not worth the price" statements with concrete quality issues

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with explicit compromises mentioned
    - "Better than nothing" statements without enthusiasm
    - Adequate for specific limited use cases only
    - Neutral comparisons to alternatives without preference

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Clear satisfaction with SPECIFIC minor criticisms
    - Exceeds basics but has durability/quality reservations
    - Effective primary use despite secondary limitations
    - Requires special handling/maintenance for optimal use →4
    - Explicit comparisons to superior products while still recommending →4
    - Aesthetic praise with functional compromises impacting experience →4
    - Temporary satisfaction without long-term confidence →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unambiguous enthusiasm + explicit repurchasing intent
    - Core functionality excellence despite minor feature gaps
    - Overcoming initial doubts/issues leading to strong recommendation
    - Emotional language ("love," "perfect") overriding neutral observations
    - Cost-effectiveness as primary driver with repeated use intent →5
    - Resolution of minor issues through adaptation/learning →5
    - Effective for intended purpose with enthusiastic value endorsement →5
    - Mentions replacing existing products with this item →5

    EDGE CASE RESOLUTION:
    - Mixed updates: Final positive conclusion dominates initial skepticism →5
    - Practical tips without dissatisfaction ("works best when...") →5
    - Specific-use praise + other limitations →5 if intended purpose achieved
    - Temporary satisfaction + long-term doubts →4
    - Material concerns + enthusiastic endorsement →5 if transformative
    - Partial failure + significant criticism →2
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "This vacuum spat debris back out immediately. Dangerous and completely useless."
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: "Lids crack easily and leak during transport. Not worth the price despite working occasionally."
Rating: 2

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job as basic storage but feels flimsy. Better than nothing for now."
Rating: 3

Example 4:
Review: "These are great as decorative throws! Too rough for comfort but perfect for styling."
Rating: 4

Example 5:
Review: "I bought mainly for sending leftovers - easier than losing containers! Will keep repurchasing despite minor leaks."
Rating: 5

Example 6:
Review: "Frankly I'm at odds with these sheets but overall ended up happy... They're not perfect but better than others I've tried."
Rating: 5

Example 7:
Review: "The shade of blue is stunning but material feels thin. Great for decorative use only."
Rating: 4

Example 8:
Review: "Initially doubted durability, but after 6 months of daily use, still performs perfectly! Worth every penny."
Rating: 5

Example 9:
Review: "Works well if you don't overstuff. Seal fails when packed full, but ideal for light snacks."
Rating: 4

Example 10:
Review: "UPDATE: Major problems resolved through customer service. Now my favorite appliance!"
Rating: 5
</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (26 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 13
  gold 5 -> 4: 9
  gold 3 -> 2: 2
  gold 1 -> 2: 1
  gold 3 -> 4: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "It is very thick and doesn't fit a lot of jars, I really think I bought something without paying attention. I guess I will start buying more bottled coke...lol

It appears very sturdy."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "I bought one of those Pyrex sets a few years ago.  You know, the one that came with the blue lids and some of the containers were rectangular --large and small-- while others were round (like these).  Well, turns out that the ones I used the most wer..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "I have only used this once so far, but I really like it. It is easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons...lol! The scrubber was effective and it cleaned a pretty sticky kitchen floor. Next..on to my tile."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "I love this vacuum and ditto the other lovers reviews. It really does go under almost anything and is very handy.

.UPDATE after 2 yrs of  major problems which were rectified thru customer service I am giving up and moving on."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "Between a puppy and frequent visits from children, I've definitely had times when it felt like the gap between proper carpet cleanings was entirely too long. On the other hand, I never entirely bought the idea that a device of this type could turn ou..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "This makes a nice easy way to buy a matched set of bags that includes reasonable versions of everything you need. They're not the best bags I've seen/had (there are a few spots where the stitching is a little off-kilter, and I don't love the material..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "These are great as decorative throws. They are much too rough to be used for anything else. I personally like to curl up on the sofa with a "super soft" throw when reading but there is no way this throw is comfortable enough for that. My friend came ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "Frankly I'm a bit at odds with these sheets but overall, ended up happy...with reservations. Growing up there was only one type of sheet...my mother, my grandmother and my great grandmother all swore by JC Penny percale sheets. Over the years I've tr..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 26 errors, 13 borderline out of 64 examples."}
